description: A dark, cobweb-filled corner of the attic. The air is stagnant and smells of mothballs. You can hear the faint scratching of something behind the walls.

wall.description: A wall covered in thick, sticky cobwebs.

floor.description: A floor covered in a thick layer of grey dust.

exit_east.description: The shelf continues east back toward the shoe rack.

exit_south.description: A small hole leads down to the bedroom.

item_chest.description: An old, locked jewelry box (sized for a shoe).

item.onCollect: Your piercing scream vibrates the lock until it pops open! Inside is a shiny silver eyelet.
